zh.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles是Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire和Hugolina de Gernon的兒子，出生在英國越可爾科比 克諾夫萊。他於大約1116年與Mrs Roger de Lascelles在英國越可爾科比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1146年在英國瓦維其可爾克諾夫萊，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾克諾夫萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles是Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire和Hugolina de Gernon的儿子，出生在英国越可爾科比 克諾夫萊。他于大约1116年与Mrs Roger de Lascelles在英国越可爾科比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1146年在英国瓦維其可爾克諾夫萊，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾克諾夫萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles was born in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England as the son of Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire and Hugolina de Gernon. He married Mrs Roger de Lascelles about 1116, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1146, in Knowle, Warwickshire, England, and was buried in Knowle, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles est né à Kirby Knowle, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire et Hugolina de Gernon. Il a épousé Mrs Roger de Lascelles environ 1116, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1146, à Knowle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Knowle, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles wurde in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire und Hugolina de Gernon geboren. Er hat um 1116 in Kirby, Yorkshire, England Mrs Roger de Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1146 in Knowle, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Knowle, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles è nato il nel Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire e Hugolina de Gernon. Lui sposato Mrs Roger de Lascelles circa 1116, nel Kirby, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1146, nel Knowle, Warwickshire, England, e fu sepolto a Knowle, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascellesはイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビー ノウルでPicot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of CambridgeshireとHugolina de Gernonの息子として生まれた。約1116年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーでMrs Roger de Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1146年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアノウルで死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアノウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles(은)는 영국 요르크실르 커비 노우일에서 Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire(와)과 Hugolina de Gernon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1116년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 Mrs Roger de Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1146년 영국 워윅실르 노우일에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 노우일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles nasceu em Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire e Hugolina de Gernon. Ele casou-se com Mrs Roger de Lascelles aproximadamente 1116, em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1146, em Knowle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Knowle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles родился в местности кирби ноул, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire и Hugolina de Gernon. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Roger de Lascelles около 1116 г. в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1146 г. в местности ноул, варвиккшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности ноул, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lascelles nació en Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire y Hugolina de Gernon. Se casó con Mrs Roger de Lascelles aproximadamente 1116, en Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1146, en Knowle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Knowle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
